title: Dog Chew Toy | Rubber Dog Chew Bone Ring Dumbell | Durable Squeaky Dog Bones Pet Chew Tooth Cleaning Ring Toy | Puppy Toys Medium Dog Stuff | Tug Dog Chews for Teeth (Blue, Triple Rings)
features: 【VARIOUS DOG CHEW TOYS】Strengthen your bonding with your pet with these different dog chews (Tug, Dumbell, Rings, Bone etc) as vibrant colours attracts the dog’s attention, reduce boredom and promotes behavioural issues with hours of fun. Great Puppy Chew Toys.

【DURABLE DOGS TOYS】This dog chew toy is made of rubber, can resist chewing (not for aggressive and extreme chewers), Rubber material used is safe and non-toxic. The Dog toy Set (Bone and Ring) & (Jumbo Dumbell) has a squeaker for an exciting sound and also have enough flexibility to play around as Dog stimulation toys. Great for Dog Gifts.

【DENTAL CARE, HEALTH & DIET CONTROL】These interactive toys for dogs helps in Gum Massage keeping the Dog's teeth Healthy and these Rubber Treat Balls are made with slots to add treat (Unlike other balls) that helps controlling the diet of your Dog.

【BRIGHT COLOUR TOY BUNDLE】The design of the bone helps promote healthy teeth and the Rings are designed different from other pet toys. The use of bright and vibrant colours is a great advantage for any season. Ideal Dog teething toys.
【SUITABLE FOR DOGS】Take this dog toy box in your Dog backpack as these are suitable for Dogs. Could be considered as durable dog toys, however, not for Strong and Aggressive Chewers.
